data.title: Berkshire Hathaway Adjusts Portfolio, Keeps Apple Stake Unchanged, Offloads Stakes in BofA
data.description: Berkshire Hathaway made significant adjustments to its portfolio in Q4 2024, reducing its investment in a number of stocks. However, its stake in Apple remains unchanged.

data.title: Bitcoin, Altcoin Set To Rise With 'Irrational Valuations,' According To Crypto Analyst, But A 'Big' Crisis Looms Afterwards
data.description: Cryptocurrency analyst Michaël van de Poppe has shared insights on potential trajectories for Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and altcoins in the coming months.

data.title: Steve Jobs-Signed Rare Apple Business Card Goes Up For Auction, Bids Touch $75,000
data.description: A rare business card signed by late Apple Inc. co-founder Steve Jobs is drawing significant attention at an ongoing auction.

data.title: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest Loads Up On Iridium, Twist Bioscience, Offloads Roku: Here Are Key Ark Trades This Friday
data.description: Cathie Wood-led Ark Invest made trades involving IRDM, TWST, PD, BEAM, ROKU, and IBTA.

data.title: Benzinga Bulls and Bears: Apple, Nvidia, Netflix and Trader Predicts Dogecoin Surge by March 24
data.description: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors’ favorite stocks over the last week — here’s a look at some of our top stories.
